tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate asked me to do their part since I'm better at it. That's a bit awkward, but I should probably just finish my own share quickly and move on.

desires: Finish my own share of the project by 19:00 so I can stop thinking about it and get back to studying.
Get this teammate's chunk done quickly without saying anything awkward or making a scene.
Avoid having to explain why I didn't do their part earlier, even though it feels stupid to just take it.
Not feel too tired tomorrow, but only if it means I don't have to sit through another long meeting.

goals.description: Finish my own project share and immediately close the tab to stop thinking about it.
goals.rationale: Academic completion is my top priority (0.5 weight). I need to hit the 19:00 deadline to mentally decompress, which aligns with my impulsive tendency to seek immediate relief from cognitive load.

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's offer silently without negotiating or making a scene.
goals.rationale: While taking their work feels stupid, avoiding interpersonal friction is crucial for me. Negotiating risks awkwardness; accepting quietly maintains the status quo with zero conflict, which fits my avoidant nature better than pushing back now.

agent.last_reasoning: Finishing my share hits the 19:00 deadline, satisfying my top academic priority. Accepting their offer would add stress and energy drain without social gain; I'll ignore it to avoid friction.
